name: Summarize Existing Run

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_id:
        description: "GitHub Actions run ID to summarize"
        required: false
        type: string
  push:
    paths:
      - ".github/workflows/summarize-existing-run.yml"
      - ".github/workflows/summarize-run-id.txt"

permissions:
  actions: read
  contents: read

jobs:
  summarize:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Resolve run_id
        id: resolve
        shell: bash
        run: |
          input_run_id="${{ inputs.run_id }}"
          file_run_id=""

          if [ -f ".github/workflows/summarize-run-id.txt" ]; then
            file_run_id=$(grep -Eo '[0-9]+' .github/workflows/summarize-run-id.txt | head -n1 || true)
          fi

          resolved="$input_run_id"
          if [ -z "$resolved" ]; then
            resolved="$file_run_id"
          fi

          if [ -z "$resolved" ]; then
            echo "Missing run_id. Provide workflow_dispatch input or set .github/workflows/summarize-run-id.txt"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "run_id=$resolved" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Resolved run_id=$resolved"

      - name: Download process artifacts from target run
        id: download
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        env:
          RUN_ID: ${{ steps.resolve.outputs.run_id }}
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const path = require('path');

            const runId = Number(process.env.RUN_ID);
            if (!Number.isInteger(runId) || runId <= 0) {
              core.setFailed(`Invalid run_id: ${process.env.RUN_ID}`);
              return;
            }
            const owner = context.repo.owner;
            const repo = context.repo.repo;

            const allArtifacts = await github.paginate(github.rest.actions.listWorkflowRunArtifacts, {
              owner,
              repo,
              run_id: runId,
              per_page: 100,
            });

            const artifacts = allArtifacts.filter(a => a.name.startsWith('process-'));
            if (artifacts.length === 0) {
              core.setFailed(`No process-* artifacts found for run_id=${runId}`);
              return;
            }

            fs.mkdirSync('artifact_zips', { recursive: true });
            for (const art of artifacts) {
              const dl = await github.rest.actions.downloadArtifact({
                owner,
                repo,
                artifact_id: art.id,
                archive_format: 'zip',
              });
              const outPath = path.join('artifact_zips', `${art.name}.zip`);
              fs.writeFileSync(outPath, Buffer.from(dl.data));
            }

            core.setOutput('artifact_count', String(artifacts.length));
            core.info(`Downloaded ${artifacts.length} process-* artifacts from run_id=${runId}`);

      - name: Unzip downloaded artifacts
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p downloaded_rows
          shopt -s nullglob
          for f in artifact_zips/*.zip; do
            unzip -oq "$f" -d downloaded_rows
          done

      - name: Merge all rows into one CSV
        id: merge
        run: |
          python - <<'PY'
          import csv
          import glob
          import os

          files = sorted(glob.glob("downloaded_rows/**/*.csv", recursive=True))
          if not files:
              raise SystemExit("No row CSV files found after downloading artifacts.")

          rows = []
          fieldnames = None
          for path in files:
              with open(path, newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                  reader = csv.DictReader(f)
                  if fieldnames is None:
                      fieldnames = reader.fieldnames
                  rows.extend(reader)

          rows.sort(
              key=lambda r: (
                  r.get("instance_name", ""),
                  r.get("instance_group", ""),
                  int(r.get("drone_capacity", 0) or 0),
                  int(r.get("drone_limit_time", 0) or 0),
                  int(r.get("theta", 0) or 0),
                  int(r.get("run", 0) or 0),
              )
          )

          os.makedirs("result", exist_ok=True)
          out_path = "result/multivisit_experiment_github_matrix.csv"
          with open(out_path, "w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
              writer.writeheader()
              writer.writerows(rows)

          ok_rows = sum(1 for r in rows if r.get("status") == "OK")
          error_rows = len(rows) - ok_rows
          cluster_rows = sum(1 for r in rows if r.get("instance_group") == "cluster")
          random_rows = sum(1 for r in rows if r.get("instance_group") == "random")

          with open(os.environ["GITHUB_OUTPUT"], "a", encoding="utf-8") as out:
              out.write(f"summary_csv={out_path}\n")
              out.write(f"total_rows={len(rows)}\n")
              out.write(f"ok_rows={ok_rows}\n")
              out.write(f"error_rows={error_rows}\n")
              out.write(f"cluster_rows={cluster_rows}\n")
              out.write(f"random_rows={random_rows}\n")
          PY

      - name: Write GitHub Summary
        run: |
          {
            echo "# Existing Run Summary"
            echo ""
            echo "- Source run_id: ${{ steps.resolve.outputs.run_id }}"
            echo "- Downloaded process artifacts: ${{ steps.download.outputs.artifact_count }}"
            echo "- Expected rows ~= artifacts * 2 (cluster + random)"
            echo "- Total result rows: ${{ steps.merge.outputs.total_rows }}"
            echo "- OK rows: ${{ steps.merge.outputs.ok_rows }}"
            echo "- Error rows: ${{ steps.merge.outputs.error_rows }}"
            echo "- Cluster rows: ${{ steps.merge.outputs.cluster_rows }}"
            echo "- Random rows: ${{ steps.merge.outputs.random_rows }}"
            echo "- Merged CSV: \`${{ steps.merge.outputs.summary_csv }}\`"
          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Upload merged CSV
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: multivisit-experiment-summary-from-existing-run
          path: result/multivisit_experiment_github_matrix.csv
